title: Discord node error due to empty Message field
symptom: The Discord node throws an error '[item 3]' when processing the workflow. This occurs without providing specific feedback on the fault.
not_this_if: Message field contains valid JSON content
root_cause: The Discord node requires the 'Message' field to contain a valid JSON string. If this field is left empty, it leads to an error during execution, as the node cannot process the request without a valid message.
fix_steps: Set the 'Message' field to an expression with a value like '{{ "" }}' or '{{ null }}'
agent_instruction: Set the 'Message' field in the Discord node to an expression with a valid value.
